title: Gold: Implement incremental fact_procurement updates
description: Update silver-to-gold2.Notebook to use Delta MERGE for fact_procurement instead of overwrite. Merge on surrogate keys, update existing rows, insert new. Dimension tables (country, material, date, indicator, stage) remain full overwrite (SCD Type 1). Run OPTIMIZE after MERGE.
acceptanceCriteria: fact_procurement uses Delta MERGE (not overwrite) when p_full_load=false
MERGE key: surrogate keys (date_key + material_key + supplier_hq_country_key + production_country_key)
fact_supply_share and fact_epi_score remain full overwrite (annual external data)
Dimension tables remain full overwrite (SCD Type 1)
OPTIMIZE runs on fact_procurement after MERGE
No duplicate records after multiple incremental loads
notes: Gold layer MERGE is the highest-value change — eliminates DirectLake full reload
Quality observability tables should also update incrementally if possible
